settings.title: Shipping Information
settings.content:
We offer free shipping on all orders over $50.

For orders under $50, standard ground shipping is a flat rate of $4.99 to anywhere in the U.S.

Standard ground delivery times typically range from 3–7 business days.

REFRESH & RECOVER

A facial cleansing solution for your on-the-go lifestyle. Our formula is engineered for sport, and formulated by Korean skincare experts. Our wipes avoid the micro-abrasions and chemical ingredients of our competitors and instead offer gentle, clean ingredients that will leave your skin fresh and replenished. We created a wipe that is non-stripping, non-irritating, and strong enough to tackle sweat and dirt no matter when or where.

Our wipes have plenty of real estate to swipe sweat, made of 100% Rayon biodegradable material.

Lightly scented with our signature eucalyptus scent to leave skin invigorated.

Ingredients

Water, Butylene Glycol, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Glycereth-26, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Sorbeth-30 Tetraoleate, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Cucumis Sativus (Cucumber) Fruit Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Sodium benzoate, Disodium EDTA, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric acid.

Directions:

Use in sweeping and circular motions all over face and neck. No need to rinse. Avoid direct contact in eyes.

Details:

Best used after workouts, activity, or any time you need a quick refresh throughout the day.

settings.heading: What makes these different from regular wipes?
settings.content:
Most wipes strip or mask.

GamePlan wipes cleanse sweat, salt, and oil while reinforcing your skin barrier — so irritation and breakouts don’t build momentum.

This is performance hygiene, not a baby wipe.

settings.heading: Will this dry my skin out?
settings.content:
No. Our formula hydrates while it cleanses.

We remove excess oil and buildup without triggering rebound dryness.

settings.heading: Is it safe for acne-prone skin?
settings.content: Yes. It’s non-comedogenic and designed to prevent sweat-driven breakouts by keeping pores clear after activity.

settings.heading: Is this just for teens?
settings.content:
No. It’s built for anyone who trains hard and sweats — youth athletes, college, pros, weekend warriors.

If you sweat, it’s for you.

settings.heading: Can I use this on my body too?
settings.content: Yes. Safe for face, neck, chest, and back — anywhere sweat and friction cause irritation.

settings.heading: Does it contain alcohol?
settings.content:
No harsh alcohols.

No parabens.

No unnecessary fragrance.

Dermatology tested and hypoallergenic.

settings.heading: How often can I use it?
settings.content:
Daily. Even multiple times per day if needed.

The formula is designed for repeat sweat cycles.
